channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: U4: delays
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle. [On 25.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle.
[On 25.05.2026]

item.title: D: service obstruction for rescue operation
item.description: service obstruction towards Absberggasse. expected duration: 11:10 watch. Reason: rescue operation in the Schlickgasse stop area. [On 25.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
service obstruction towards Absberggasse. expected duration: 11:10 watch. Reason: rescue operation in the Schlickgasse stop area.
[On 25.05.2026]

item.title: Brünner Straße 59
item.description: The installation of a district heating line is carried out during the night from 20:00 to 05:00 with the release of a correspondingly wide residual runway of at least … [17.05.2026 – 14.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The installation of a district heating line is carried out during the night from 20:00 to 05:00 with the release of a correspondingly wide residual runway of at least …
[17.05.2026 – 14.08.2026]

item.title: Brünner Straße from Schloßhofer Straße and Am Spitz to Karl-Schäfer-Straße
item.description: The stop Peitlgasse (direction Floridsdorf) of the public transport concerned is to Brünner Straße ON. construction phase 1 of 4 … [Since 11.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop Peitlgasse (direction Floridsdorf) of the public transport concerned is to Brünner Straße ON. construction phase 1 of 4 …
[Since 11.05.2026]

item.title: Gentzgasse from Aumannplatz and Lazaristengasse to Köhlergasse
item.description: Since also the affected tram lines in the period of the 4. The track construction works in the Währinger Straße from the ON 125 to the Aumannplatz, on the Aumannplatz from the … [27.04.2026 – 12.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:

[27.04.2026 – 12.07.2026]

item.title: Maurer Long alley from Kunkegasse to Maurer Long alley 64
item.description: In the plateau area Geßlgasse, however, the work takes place at night during the idle time of the affected public transport. [12.04.2026 – 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the plateau area Geßlgasse, however, the work takes place at night during the idle time of the affected public transport.
[12.04.2026 – 29.05.2026]

item.title: U5: Spitalgasse from 29 to 33
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a replacement platform at least 2.00 m wide on … [11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:

[11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]

item.title: Gräffergasse from crossing Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse to crossing Heigerleinstraße
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparation for underground construction) is carried out in general at day, with the Gräffergasse from the Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse to the … [Since 19.10.2025]
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Donaufelder Straße 67
item.description: only in the idle time of the tram. [19.04.2026 – 26.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
only in the idle time of the tram.
[19.04.2026 – 26.06.2026]

item.title: U5: Währinger Straße 40-42 to 54
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out during the day and, if necessary, during the night, during the time from 22:00 to 05:00 at … [11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out during the day and, if necessary, during the night, during the time from 22:00 to 05:00 at …
[11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]
